items.normalized_text:
Hundreds of space companies we have all grown to know and love were founded—and raised billions of dollars—on the assumption that SpaceX had solved launch with Falcon 9, all but guaranteeing reliable, predictable access to orbit. But that premise is now on shaky grounds, turning the future of many satellite businesses into an existential question. 
The post Falcon 9 Sales Freeze Anxiety and Our Launch Ramp Forecast Model for New Rockets appeared first on Payload Pro.

The post Falcon 9 Sales Freeze Anxiety and Our Launch Ramp Forecast Model for New Rockets appeared first on Payload.

items.normalized_text: 星际荣耀双曲线三号火箭动力系统试车成功3 月 22 日，星际荣耀自主研发的双曲线三号可重复使用火箭一级辅助动力系统，完成全系统试车，具备交付总装条件。该系统是可回收火箭核心部件，试车成功为双曲线三号首飞奠定基础。中国商业航天加速发展，可重复使用  手机新浪网
